description:
Verso: Two distinct documents. The one on the left is dated 19th Muḥarram 808 H, but the genre is difficult to make out. 

The document on the right begins with a petition-like formula "asʾal marāḥim al-ḥaḍra", probably a letter of appeal. Has a date towards the end which mentions the year [.]88, but part of it is faded out.
description_he: גב: שני מסמכים נפרדים; האחד מתוארך 19 מוחרם 808 להג'רה; השני פותח בנוסח עצומה 'אסאל מראחם אל-חדרה' ומזכיר שנה [.]88
